GitHub Flavored Markdown Spec fixture
======================================

File:        gfm_spec_0_29.json
Source:      https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/cmark-gfm/master/test/spec.txt
Spec title:  GitHub Flavored Markdown Spec
Version:     0.29
Date:        2019-04-06
License:     CC-BY-SA 4.0 (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/)

gfm_spec_0_29.json is a machine-readable extraction of the example blocks from
the upstream spec.txt. Each entry is {markdown, html, example, section}. Tab
visualization arrows (U+2192) in the source were replaced with literal tab
characters, matching the convention used for the CommonMark fixture
(commonmark_spec_0_31_2.json).

This fixture is used only by the test suite (tests/test_gfm_spec.py) to measure
GFM specification compliance. It is licensed under CC-BY-SA 4.0 by GitHub, Inc.
